title: Dryopteris pseudofilix-mas
taxonomy: Dryopteris pseudofilix-mas is a species of the genus Dryopteris, which is a group of ferns in the family Dryopteridaceae. This classification places it within the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically, the division Pteridophyta. The family Dryopteridaceae is a part of the order Polypodiales, which is a group of ferns with two distinct types of fronds. The classification of Dryopteris pseudofilix-mas is an example of the ongoing process of classification and naming of plant species.
